qa_pairs.question: What is the nature of the courses listed, and how are they delivered to participants?
qa_pairs.answer: These are self-paced (or self-directed) courses developed by technical staff, which can be taken at any time, allowing participants to proceed at their own pace.

qa_pairs.question: What kind of recognition do participants receive after successfully completing one of these courses?
qa_pairs.answer: Upon successful completion of the quizzes and/or assignments, participants will typically receive a Certificate of Completion for the course. For the 'Introduction to SciNet, Niagara, and Mist' course, completion counts towards an HPC certificate.

qa_pairs.question: Do all the listed courses require an Alliance account to participate?
qa_pairs.answer: No, while some courses do require an Alliance account, others, such as 'Introduction to Trillium' and 'GIT Version control,' do not, though an account is often recommended.
